name: delete_event
description: Permanently deletes a calendar event by its unique identifier. Optionally notifies all attendees with a cancellation message and reason.

event_id.description: The unique identifier of the calendar event to delete.
event_id.$comment: Opaque string ID to support various calendar backends (Google, Outlook, CalDAV, etc.).

notify_attendees.description: Whether to send cancellation notifications to all event attendees.
notify_attendees.$comment: Defaults to true to follow calendar etiquette best practices; silently deleting without notification risks missed appointments.

cancellation_reason.description: Optional human-readable explanation for the cancellation included in the notification email sent to attendees.
examples: Speaker is unavailable due to travel.
Project cancelled — no further action required.
cancellation_reason.$comment: Only relevant when notify_attendees is true. Limited to free text; no structured reason codes needed at this interface level.
